name: Gopher's Indoor Golf Simulators
about: Gopher's Indoor Golf Simulators is a golf simulation venue that offers booking through an online platform, though currently encountering network errors preventing real-time availability checks. They provide two main bay types: a Public Rate option and a Championship Bay, with pricing starting at $40 for half an hour in the Championship Bay. The venue operates using the TrackMan golf booking system. Additional services include digital gift card purchases with a promotional offer and access to a membership program.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for accurate simulation and data tracking
Variety of bay options, including a Championship tier for advanced play
Flexible digital gift card program with bonus credit promotions

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Booking system is powered by TrackMan, specific hardware models not detailed

faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental options, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.answer: Information regarding outside food and drink policies is not available on the website.

faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time required for a full 18-hole simulation.
